cv.title: CV Generator
cv.subtitle: Create your professional CV in a few guided steps

personal.title: Professional title

placeholders.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
placeholders.summary: 2-3 sentences summarising your experience and objectives…

tips: First name, last name and email are required.
Your professional title will appear just below your name.
Fill in LinkedIn / GitHub only if your profiles are up to date.
Age, driving licence and mobility are important information for recruiters.

mobility.label: Mobility
mobility.placeholder: Specify your mobility (e.g. Toulouse + 50 km, National...)

experience.title: Professional experience
tips: Most recent to oldest.
Action verbs: developed, managed, optimised…
Quantify your achievements.
Tick 'Currently employed' if you still work there.

education.title: Education
tips: Most recent to oldest.
Mention honours if applicable.
For recent graduates, education may come before experience.

skills.title: Skills
skills.name: Name
tips: 8 to 12 well-chosen skills.
Mix hard skills and soft skills.
Sort by proficiency / relevance.
Be honest about your levels.

interests.title: Interests
interests.name: Interest
tips: Be specific: 'Mountain trail running' rather than 'Sport'.
An original interest can spark a conversation in an interview.
Limit to 3-5 interests.

mode.howToProceed: How would you like to proceed?
mode.chooseOption: Choose an option to get started

create.description: Fill in the sections step by step

import.ready: Ready to import — manual steps are disabled

generalTips: Keep the layout clean and airy

invoice.title: Invoice Generator
invoice.subtitle: Create a professional invoice in a few guided steps

invoice.title: Invoice information
invoice.subtitle: Fill in the basic details of your invoice.
tips: The invoice number is generated automatically; you can edit it.
The due date is calculated automatically based on the payment terms.
The purchase order (PO) is optional but recommended for companies.

company.title: Your company
company.subtitle: This information will appear as the issuer on the invoice.
company.name: Company name
tips: Company name is required.
Add your tax ID number if you are VAT-registered.

client.title: Client information
client.subtitle: This information will appear as the recipient on the invoice.
client.name: Client name
tips: Client name is required.
Enter the email to send the invoice directly from the application.

items.title: Line items
items.subtitle: Add the products or services to invoice.
tips: Each line must have a description and a unit price greater than 0.
Discount is a percentage (e.g. 10 for 10%).
The total for each line is calculated automatically.

payment.title: Bank details
payment.subtitle: This information will make it easier for your client to pay.
tips: Bank details are optional but recommended for wire transfers.
For Cameroon, specify your BEAC account number or your bank statement reference.

notes.title: Notes and conditions
notes.subtitle: Add a personalised message or your general terms and conditions.
notes.messagePlaceholder: Thank you for your trust. Do not hesitate to contact us for any questions.
notes.termsPlaceholder: Payment upon receipt of invoice. Any unpaid invoice after the due date will incur late payment penalties of 1.5% per month.

preview.title: Invoice preview
preview.subtitle: Review your invoice before generating it.

tips.title: Tips for an effective invoice
list: Check the invoice number to avoid duplicates
Include your bank details to facilitate payment
Add a thank-you message in the notes
Review the amounts before generating the PDF
Keep a copy of every invoice sent

quoteDialog.title: Select a quote to invoice
quoteDialog.description: Choose the version of the quote you wish to convert into an invoice

history.title: Invoice History
history.delete_confirm_message: This action is irreversible. Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?

quote.title: Quote Generator
quote.subtitle: Create a professional quote in a few guided steps

client_step.title: Client information
client_step.subtitle: Enter the details of the client receiving the quote.
tips: First name, last name, email and phone are required.
Company is optional but recommended for B2B quotes.
The quote type allows you to categorise the nature of the work.

emitter_step.title: Your company (issuer)
emitter_step.subtitle: This information will appear in the service provider block of the quote.
tips: Company name is required.
The logo will be displayed in the top left of the PDF quote.
SIRET, APE and VAT number appear in the provider block.

project_step.title: Project details
project_step.subtitle: Describe the project to be carried out for this quote.
tips: Project name is required.
A clear description reassures the client that you understand their needs.
The validity date is automatically set to 30 days but can be changed.

items_step.title: Quote items
items_step.subtitle: List the services or supplies to be quoted.
tips: Each item must have a description and a unit price.
Labour time: labour duration (e.g. 1.0h). Unit: Set, h, m², etc.
Line discount is a percentage.
Use the ↑↓ arrows to reorder items.
items_step.description_placeholder: E.g. Supply and installation of tiling

payment_step.title: Payment settings
payment_step.subtitle: Configure global VAT, discount and deposit.
tips: VAT in Cameroon is 19.25% (official rate). In France: 20%.
The global discount applies to the subtotal of all items.
The deposit can be a fixed amount or a percentage of the total (incl. VAT).

notes_step.title: Notes and conditions
notes_step.subtitle: This text will appear in the "Payment conditions" section of the quote.
tips: Additional notes are displayed under 'Payment conditions'.
State the deposit conditions (e.g. 30% at start, 70% at end).
notes_step.payment_conditions_placeholder:
- 30% due 1 week after start
- 70% at the end of the 1st month
notes_step.general_conditions_placeholder: Payment terms, validity, late payment penalties...

preview_step.title: Quote preview
preview_step.subtitle: Review your quote before generating it.

tips_section.title: Tips for an effective quote
tips: Detail each item precisely to avoid disputes
Clearly state the quote validity (30 days recommended)
Mention lead times and delivery conditions
Request a deposit upon signing to secure the project
Review the amounts before sending to the client
Keep a signed copy of every accepted quote

history.title: Quote History
history.delete_confirm_message: This action is irreversible. Are you sure you want to delete this quote?

credit_note.title: Credit Note Generator
credit_note.subtitle: Create a professional credit note linked to an existing invoice

identification_step.title: Credit note identification
identification_step.subtitle: Number, date, original invoice, reason and refund method.
tips: The credit note number is required and must be unique.
Always indicate the original invoice to which the credit note relates.
The reason and refund method will appear on the PDF document.

emitter_step.title: Your company (issuer)
emitter_step.subtitle: This information will appear in the provider block of the credit note.
tips: Company name is required.
The logo will be displayed in the top left of the PDF.
SIRET, APE and VAT number appear in the issuer block.

client_step.title: Client information
client_step.subtitle: Recipient of the credit note.
tips: Enter the email to send the credit note directly from the application.
The client VAT number appears in the EEC column of the summary table.

items_step.title: Credit note lines
items_step.subtitle: Add the items or services to be credited.
tips: Each line must have a description and a unit price > 0.
Amounts represent credits — they will appear in orange on the PDF.
Discount is a percentage (e.g. 10 for 10%).

notes_step.title: Notes and references
notes_step.subtitle: Additional information that will appear on the credit note.
notes_step.notes_placeholder: File reference, detailed reason, return number...

tips_section.title: Best practices for credit notes
tips: Always reference the original invoice to ensure traceability
A credit note should be issued as soon as the refund is confirmed
Keep a signed copy in your client file
Check that the credit note amount matches the original invoice

alerts.generate_first: Please generate the credit note first

history.title: Credit Note History
history.delete_confirm_message: This action is irreversible. Are you sure you want to delete this credit note?
